title: agrostis alba var. dispar
intro: Agrostis alba var. dispar, also known as a variant of the white bentgrass, is a type of flowering plant in the grass family Poaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Agrostis alba var. dispar include its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation in the body. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water or oil to create teas, tinctures, and salves that can be used to treat various health conditions.
